channel.title: Sound Amplifier on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Sound Amplifier on Tech Tracker

item.title: Google made a Sound Amplifier app for Android !
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-LOqQBzGe6Bc/X_HY_RuUEjI/AAAAAAAACi8/NDpIRfiMhsknptE49f6JSr2lBynoGXQhQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1609685234337317-0.png" alt=""> Do you need a sound amplifier ? that can improve audio listening experience on Android ! Google’s sound amplifier can do alot of useful things that can improve overall sound experience on your android device. Sound amplifier with 4.0 rating available in playstore . **° App Info ° ** **<img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-U_0J9BSkbFQ/X_HY7s24T-I/AAAAAAAACi0/gZMaJsXVWSwGKKbZ5fJl1TFVbQbdksKHgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1609685203546325-1.png" alt=""> ** ° What’s new ° • Filter, augment, and amplify video and audio played on your device.
